description: App lifecycle — list, get with versions, create, download bundle, and archive.
Cloud component lifecycle — list, get with versions, create, update, download bundle, archive, and recover.
Cloud component execution — trigger, track progress via WebSocket, list, get, and abort executions.
File metadata and versioning — get, update, and delete per-version metadata; list, archive, recover, and permanently delete versions.
File lifecycle — list, get with versions, create, rename, upload new version, download by version, archive, and recover.
Folder lifecycle — list, get, create nested folders, list files inside a folder, rename, download as ZIP, archive, and recover.
Hidden file lifecycle — create, get, list by parent, download, and delete.
Item icon management — upload, download, and remove icons on any item (file, app, or component).
Permission checks — single and batch permission verification using PlatformClient (requires user JWT, not API token).
